title: Inventory Dashboard Display
description: The system shall display a dashboard that updates in real-time, showing current stock levels, units nearing expiration, and open transfusion requests.
rationale: To enable efficient management of inventory, reduce waste, and meet transfusion demands.
business_value: Improves operational efficiency, reduces blood wastage, and ensures timely fulfillment of transfusion requests.

source.description: As a blood bank manager I need a dashboard displaying current stock levels, units nearing expiration, and open transfusion requests so that I can efficiently manage inventory, reduce waste, and meet transfusion demands.

acceptance_criteria: I see a section titled 'Current Stock Levels' listing each blood type with quantity
I see a section titled 'Units Nearing Expiration' listing each unit's type, expiration date, and days until expiry
I see a section titled 'Open Transfusion Requests' listing each request with patient ID, blood type, urgency, and request date
preconditions: I am logged in as a blood bank manager
functional_constraints: The dashboard should update in real-time to reflect current data
"Units nearing expiration" means blood units within a configurable threshold (e.g., 5 days) of their expiration date
edge_cases: What happens when there are no units nearing expiration?
How does the system handle sudden increases in transfusion requests?
What if a blood unit's expiration date changes while it is still in inventory?

interfaces.name: Inventory Database
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the database to retrieve current stock levels, expiration dates, and transfusion requests.

interfaces.name: Blood Unit Data API
interfaces.description: The requirement uses this API to fetch real-time data about blood units in inventory.

interfaces.name: Web Browser or Internal System
interfaces.description: The dashboard is accessed via a web browser or internal system, requiring the use of appropriate UI components and layouts.

test_cases.description: Verify that the 'Current Stock Levels' section displays all blood types with their respective quantities.
test_cases.expected_result: The dashboard shows each blood type in inventory along with its current quantity.

test_cases.description: Check if the 'Units Nearing Expiration' section lists units within the configurable threshold (e.g., 5 days) of expiration.
test_cases.expected_result: The dashboard correctly identifies and displays blood units that are close to their expiration date.

test_cases.description: Test the 'Open Transfusion Requests' section for accuracy in displaying all pending requests.
test_cases.expected_result: The dashboard accurately lists each open transfusion request with patient ID, blood type, urgency, and request date.
